rationale: Educ. Code §54.051 prescribes tuition rates for higher education institutions. It contains no reference to property tax homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13. The proposed change is unrelated to this statute.
quote: Tuition for a resident student at a general academic teaching institution is $50 per semester credit hour.
_note: No conflict. The tuition rate statute is independent of the property tax homestead exemption.
